claim_boundary: Trace-level activation rerun of the #2221 held-out static-recenter smoke; not benchmark-strength, transfer, or planner-improvement evidence.
command: LOGURU_LEVEL=WARNING TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL=2 scripts/dev/run_worktree_shared_venv.sh -- python scripts/validation/run_static_recenter_activation_trace.py --output-json <worktree-local diagnostics summary>
interpretation: The held-out smoke did not merely lack durable activation evidence: the instrumented rerun shows static recentering did not activate on either matched row. The unsolved station-platform case is mechanism_inactive; the intersection-wait case was already solved by the baseline.
recommendation: Do not tune or promote static recentering for this held-out slice. Treat the #2221 non-transfer result as an inactive-mechanism negative for the unsolved row, and prefer other route-progress mechanisms unless a new slice predeclares states where static recenter should activate.
